Member.title: Member
Member.description: A guild member in Ragnarok Origin Classic

job.description: The class/job of the member (e.g., Lord Knight, High Priest)

dateJoined.description: The date the member joined the guild

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the member (if applicable)

Event.title: Event
Event.description: A regular guild event (e.g., Guild War, Boss Hunt)

Party.title: Party
Party.description: A group of up to 5 members within an event

name.description: Name of the party (e.g., Party 1, Alpha Squad)

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: A member assigned to a party

role.description: The role of the member in the party

subtitle.description: Subtitle or description of the guild

logoUrl.description: URL to the guild's logo image

/settings/{settingId}.description: Collection for guild settings (usually a single document 'guild_settings')

/events/{eventId}/parties/{partyId}.description: Subcollection of parties for a specific event

/events/{eventId}/parties/{partyId}/assi.description: Subcollection of assignments for a specific party
